3002610.name: Pebbles Quest
3002610.description:
This is Pebbles Quest. An interactive story about a little knight who goes on silly adventures and meets crazy characters!
The Princess has been kidnapped by evildoers, and Pebbles must now breach the Castle, facing a gauntlet of traps and trials to rescue his one true love.

FEATURES

  • Choose-your-own-Quest
  • Simple point n click gameplay
  • Meet a cast of silly characters
  • Replay to explore every option
  • Keep your eyes peeled for secret routes...

Inspired by the Henry Stickmin series, this game will see Pebbles square off against other knights, learn the mysterious ways of the wizards, conquer fantastical foes, and solve basic puzzles. This silly hand-animated world is full of blink-and-you-miss it jokes and slapstick humor that will keep you coming back like your favorite Saturday Morning Cartoons!
3002610.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
